creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
I'm not able to do any testing for a few days but all I had to do to use the new toolchain was edit sdkconfig and change this line:

    CONFIG_TOOLPREFIX="/usr/local/xtensa-esp-elf/bin/xtensa-esp-elf-"

That said I haven't gotten far enough to build a binary let alone boot one...
